$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/date-picker/date-picker.tsx. It is a Button trigger + Popover + Calendar — the only token of its own is the trigger width; everything else comes from button.*, popover.* and calendar.*.

triggerWidth.$description: w-[240px] — literal in source, no space token at 240px.

triggerFontWeight.$description: Overrides the button's font-medium — a date field should not read as a label.

emptyForeground.$description: Placeholder state when no date is picked.
